info.name: TeamHub
info.summary: Team collaboration hub — messaging, activity feed and app widgets for Nextcloud Teams
info.description:
TeamHub started as a visual mock up to discus team based working in Nextcloud and grew into a workspace built on top of Nextcloud Teams (Circles).
Each team gets a shared home with: - **Messages** — post announcements, questions and polls to your team - **Activity feed** — a single view of recent file, calendar, task and member changes across all shared resources - **App tabs** — quick-links to the team's shared Talk chat, Files folder, Calendar and Deck board - **Sidebar widgets** — upcoming calendar events, open Deck tasks, Pages, and the activity snapshot - **Team management** — invite members by user, group, email or federated account; manage roles and pending requests - **Customizable view** — users can create their own layout - **Integrations** — developers can integrate their app with teamhub
TeamHub works entirely within your Nextcloud instance and does not require any external services.
info.author: Justin Doek
